About us

Barking Road's local favourite, made fresh daily.

Chicken City has been serving the neighbourhood bold, honest flavour, hand-breaded chicken, juicy smash burgers, and sides worth queuing for. Every order is cooked fresh, never microwaved, never rushed.

Fresh ingredientsPrepped daily, never frozen shortcuts
Fast serviceReady quick, without cutting corners
Local favouriteA Barking Road regular for years
Friendly atmosphereWelcoming staff, honest service

FAQ

Frequently asked questions.

Is Chicken City halal?

Yes, Chicken City is 100% halal.

Do you deliver?

Yes, order delivery through Deliveroo, Uber Eats or Just Eat using the buttons above.

Can I collect my order in person?

Yes, walk-in and collection orders are welcome during opening hours.

What are your opening hours?

See the full weekly opening hours in the contact section below.
